message:
fix(fwc): add missing timestamp regression check to audit chain verification

FWC's verify_chain checked seq gaps, prev linking, fork detection, and head
consistency but omitted the timestamp regression check that the fcp-audit
library has (audit.timestamp_regression). This meant clock-skew and timestamp
tampering went undetected in the CLI verification path.

Add the same non-decreasing timestamp check: if occurred_at < prev.occurred_at,
emit audit.timestamp_regression (non-critical, produces Warn not Fail, matching
the library behavior).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
